ranked_jobs.title: Sr. Staff Technical Program Manager - Reliability

Focus on multi-quarter reliability roadmaps and cross-company programs indicates experience with large-scale system modernization and governance
Requires collaboration with senior engineering leaders and multiple teams which fits multi-team operating model redesign
Emphasis on improving reliability culture and organizational processes matches with governance and operating model evolution
Experience preferred in hyperscale cloud providers aligns with enterprise-grade infrastructure environments

ranked_jobs.title: Technical Program Manager, Internal Systems

Focus on internal systems platform and product solutions, aligning with enterprise platform and system modernization
Responsibilities include cross-functional strategy, planning, and execution of large-scale technical programs
Remote position fitting candidate preference for remote roles
Strong emphasis on process improvements, governance, and building frictionless internal user experiences, which is related to internal operating model improvements

ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Stripe Infrastructure
why: Role is a remote full-time Product Manager position at Stripe focused on infrastructure, which aligns with preference for remote and platform transformation roles.

Responsibilities include partnership with multiple engineering teams on major systems, focusing on systemic architecture decisions, build vs buy trade-offs, and sustainable ecosystem design which are relevant to enterprise platform transformation and system consolidation.

Candidate would work on distributed, high availability infrastructure and internal AI agents aimed at productivity and customer experience, adding some relevance to modernization and AI usage in enterprise contexts.

Requires 7+ years of Product Management experience ideally in enterprise or B2B, including launching and scaling complex products and managing diverse stakeholders, which matches enterprise transformation expectations.

ranked_jobs.title: Sr. Staff Technical Program Manager - Reliability

Technical program management at senior staff level, requiring deep domain expertise and cross-functional influence

ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Commerce Systems
why: Role focuses on enterprise-wide platform transformation by harmonizing disparate billing, seller systems, and financial data warehouses into a unified infrastructure
Strong emphasis on system consolidation and modernization of legacy systems within a large organization
Role requires cross-functional leadership with multiple teams including engineering, finance, legal, and go-to-market, indicating broad enterprise impact
Fully remote US-based role at a top-tier fintech company known for large-scale, complex platform infrastructure
